# Meta

This is a Bookdown GitBook site hosted on GitHub pages. With [GitHub Flow](https://docs.github.com/en/get-started/using-github/github-flow), it serves as a wiki. However, I won't be accepting contributions until I have completed more of the site construction.

## Syntax {-}

:::{.det}
[Collapsible Section]{.summ}

- syntax:

  ```
  :::{.det}
  [A Summary]{.summ}
  
  Details Go Here
  
  #. Item 1
  #. Item 2
  #. Item 3
  
  :::
  ```

- produces:

  :::{.det}
  
  [A Summary]{.summ}
  
  Details Go Here
  
  #. Item 1
  #. Item 2
  #. Item 3
  
  :::

:::

:::{.det}

[Page Construction Label]{.summ}

- syntax: 

  ```
  {{construction}}
  ```
- produces:

  {{construction}}

:::


:::{.det}

[Section Construction Label]{.summ}

- syntax:

  ```
  {{sconstruction}}
  ```

- produces:

  {{sconstruction}}

:::


:::{.det}

[Page-Specific TOC]{.summ}


- syntax:

  ```
  :::{.back-toc}

  [TOC](#page-specific-toc-label)
  
  :::
  ```
- produces:

  *(uses example toc-link)*

  :::{.back-toc}

  [TOC](#bs-toc)
  
  :::

:::

## Link Labels

[msnip]: https://snip.mathpix.com/home  "Mathpix Snip Web App"

- `[msnip]: https://snip.mathpix.com/home  "Mathpix Snip Web App"`

## Maintenance

*The syntax above is achieved at times through "hacks" (in the sense of being poorly constructed), so the below should not be reused.*

- macro-filter.lua
- style.css
